title: Create a World
description: A fun modpack that combines Warium with CBC and VS
body: This modpack combines Create with many addons such as "Create Big Cannons" and "Eureka" with other mods like Terralith, Warium, and Alex's mobs to create a fun and immersive experience. This modpack is recommended to be played with friends as it's purpose is to give players the ability to make custom war machines without having to sort through all the versions of different mods to make sure they are all compatible.
